name: evidence-forge
description: Evidence-first coding workflow with SQL-tracked verification, adversarial review, and scoped commits.

interface.longDescription: A Codex-oriented evidence-first coding workflow inspired by Burke Holland's Anvil. It surveys existing patterns, captures a baseline, records verification in SQLite, runs adversarial review, and creates a scoped commit with rollback instructions.
defaultPrompt: Use Evidence Forge to implement this change.
Run an evidence-first fix for this bug.
Verify and commit this change with Evidence Forge.
